reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Acked the patch without any issues or concerns.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, Mar 18, 2026 at 03:53:22PM -0400, Johannes Weiner wrote:
> The MEMCG and !MEMCG paths have the same pattern. Share the code.
> 
> Reviewed-by: David Hildenbrand (Arm) <david@kernel.org>
> Signed-off-by: Johannes Weiner <hannes@cmpxchg.org>

Acked-by: Shakeel Butt <shakeel.butt@linux.dev>

reviews.author: Lorenzo Stoakes (Oracle)
reviews.summary: Approved the patch and added a Reviewed-by tag, noting that it's a nice symmetry.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: The patch deduplicates the lock_list_lru() function by sharing a common pattern between the MEMCG and !MEMCG paths, reducing code duplication.
